description_long: This handbag features a structured rectangular body with a distinctive plaid pattern in shades of tan, black, and dark brown. The upper section and handles are crafted from a glossy, dark brown material, providing a striking contrast to the patterned fabric below. Two short, rounded handles are attached at the top, complemented by a long, thin, adjustable shoulder strap that attaches to gold-tone hardware on either side. The bag appears to have a flat base, allowing it to stand upright, and the overall construction suggests a semi-rigid form. The plaid pattern is bold and geometric, with a large central diamond motif on both main faces. No visible brand logo or decorative embellishments are present, giving the bag a classic and versatile appearance.
description: A structured rectangular handbag with a bold tan and black plaid pattern, dark brown glossy trim, and both short handles and a long adjustable shoulder strap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plaid pattern with a central diamond motif, dark brown glossy trim, and both handles and shoulder strap clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slim depth of the bag, the plaid pattern wrapping around, and the attachment points of the shoulder strap.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same plaid pattern and dark brown trim, both handles and the shoulder strap visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the bag's narrow depth and the continuation of the plaid pattern, with strap attachment visible.
attribute_strap_type: One long, thin, adjustable crossbody or shoulder strap attached with gold-tone hardware, plus two short, rounded hand-carry handles.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Closure mechanism not clearly visible, but likely a zipper or magnetic snap at the top opening.
attribute_pattern: Bold plaid pattern in tan, black, and dark brown with a central diamond motif.
